skills.title: Linkrunner - Flutter integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into a Flutter app: install, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up deep linking (Universal Links / App Links / custom schemes) with verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - React Native integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into a React Native app: install, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up deep linking with React Navigation + verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - Expo integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into an Expo app via the config plugin: install, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up deep linking with expo-router / Linking + verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - iOS (native) integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into a native iOS (Swift) app: install via Swift Package Manager, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up Universal Links + custom URL schemes with verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - Android (native) integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into a native Android (Kotlin) app: install via Maven, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up App Links + custom schemes with assetlinks verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - Capacitor integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into a Capacitor / Ionic app: install, init, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up deep linking (App Links / Universal Links / custom schemes) with verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - Cordova integration
skills.description: Integrate the Linkrunner attribution SDK into an Apache Cordova app: install the cordova-linkrunner plugin, init via window.linkrunner, identify users, track events/revenue, and set up deep linking (App Links / Universal Links / custom schemes) with verification.

skills.title: Linkrunner - Unity integration
skills.description: Integrate Linkrunner into a Unity app via the native Android and iOS SDKs with platform bridges (Android io.linkrunner:android-sdk / LinkrunnerJava, iOS LinkrunnerKit Swift bridge, C# wrapper) and deep-link verification. There is no dedicated Unity SDK.
